Important Dates

ISORC 2027 Important Dates

All deadlines are Anywhere on Earth (AoE, UTC−12) unless stated otherwise. Dates will be confirmed after organizing committee approval.

Conference Dates April 2–4, 2027 IIT Ropar, India

ISORC 2027

30th IEEE International Symposium on Real-Time Distributed Computing

April 2–4, 2027 · Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, India

Host

Department of Computer Science and Engineering, IIT Ropar

Indian Institute of Technology Ropar, Punjab, India
